quality.rationale: 基于流体元涡度与超曲面正交性的等价性进行多步逻辑推导，物理背景为宇宙学共动观测，但题干未附答案与解析过程

origin.question:
19.38 In cosmology one usually uses coordinates comoving with the galaxies. Let $(r, x^i)$ be such a system, and let the metric take the general form
$$
\mathrm {d s}^{2} = - \mathrm {d} \tau^{2} + 2 \mathrm {g}_{0 \mathrm {i}} \mathrm {d} \tau \mathrm {d x}^{\mathrm {i}} + \mathrm {g}_{\mathrm {i j}} \mathrm {d x}^{\mathrm {i}} \mathrm {d x}^{\mathrm {j}}
$$
where $\mathbf{g}_{0\mathrm{i}}$ and $\mathbf{g}_{\mathrm{ij}}$ can be functions of $\pmb{\tau}$ and $\mathbf{x}^{\mathrm{i}}$ . Show (g) that if $\omega_{\alpha \beta} \neq 0$ , no choice of $	au$ and $\mathbf{x}^{\mathrm{i}}$ can make $\mathbf{g}_{0\mathrm{i}} = 0$ everywhere and that this means that $\omega_{\alpha \beta, 0} \neq 0$ implies nongeodesic motion of the galaxies.
